title: Rename Metrics Audit Logs Modal to Change History
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the audit logs modal titled 'Change History' instead of 'Metrics Audit Logs', so that the terminology is clearer and more user-friendly.
description: Renames the modal title from 'Metrics Audit Logs' to 'Change History' for improved clarity.
acceptance_criteria: Modal title reads 'Change History' instead of 'Metrics Audit Logs'
ux_changes: Modal title changed from 'Metrics Audit Logs' to 'Change History'.
comment_summary: Quick label change confirmed and approved on staging.
